scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run start -w @parcel-scrubber/web" "npm run start:dev -w @parcel-scrubber/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @parcel-scrubber/web && npm run build -w @parcel-scrubber/api
scripts.test: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run test:web" "npm run test:api"
